assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly states PDB checking is first priority with '(most common cause)' notation and emphasizes it's '#1 cause of stuck drains'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command which uses -A flag equivalent to --all-namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: 'kubectl describe pdb' to check blocking pods, commands for pending pods, bare pods identification, and pod eviction events

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Provides commands to check pending pods, resource allocation, and node capacity with 'kubectl get pods -A | grep Pending' and resource checking commands

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Includes kubectl patch command to temporarily adjust PDB with maxUnavailable setting: 'kubectl patch pdb PDB_NAME -n NAMESPACE -p '{"spec":{"maxUnavailable":"50%"}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or notification system for PDB-blocked evictions

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command to adjust surge settings: 'gcloud container node-pools update' with max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade parameters

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Includes commands to check admission webhooks: 'kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations' and 'kubectl get mutatingwebhookconfigurations'

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands under 'Monitor Progress' section including watch command for nodes and gcloud operations list to track upgrade status
